/CAL:DEFENSE PETITION TO RECALL SENTENCE AND RESENTENCE PC 1170,18/DEF:'S170,6CCP AS TO JUDGE YAGGY ON FILE/DAWT/DEF:IS CURRENTLY IN STATE PRISON//X:DEFENSE PETITION TO REDUCE COUNT 6 & COUNT 7 TO MISDEMEANORS PER PC  1170,18 -PROP, 47 IS GRANTED/X:PEOPLE DID NOT OBJECT TO THE PETITION/X:COUNTS 6 & 7 REDUCED TO MISDEMEANORS/DEF:RESENTENCED AS TO COUNTS 6 & 7 ONLY/X:THE 16 MONTHS STATE PRISON SENTENCE IMPOSED ON 10-19-2011 ON COUNT 6 IS SET ASIDE & VACATED/X:THE 16 MONTHS STATE PRISON SENTENCE IMPOSED ON 10-19-2011 ON COUNT 7 IS SET ASIDE & VACATED/X:IN LIGHT OF THE INTENT OF PROP 47AND GIVEN DEFENDANT'S CURRENT MEDICAL CONDITION, COURT SENTENCED THE DEFENDANT ON COUNTS 6 & 7 AS FOLLOWS=/X:COUNT 6 SENTENCE IS 1 YEAR COUNTY JAIL TO RUN CONCURRENT WITH COUNTS 2 &4/X:COUNT 7 SENTENCE IS 1 YEAR COUNTY JAILTO RUN CONCURRENT WITH COUNTS 2 &4/DEF: TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVEDNOT TO EXCEED 20% PER PC 1170,12(A)(5)/X:AS OF NOV, 10, 2015, DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE 1,881 ACTUAL DAYS CREDIT TIME SERVED PLUS 200 SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF2,081 DAYS/X:ON 10-19-2011 AS TO COUNT 2 THE DEFENDANT WAS SENTENCED TO4 YRS,  STATE PRISON, UPPER TERM DOUBLED PER PC 667(D)(E) FOR A TOTAL OF 8YRS, STATE PRISON,/X:ON 10-19-2011 AS TO COUNT 4 THE DEFENDANT WAS SENTENCED TO 8 MONTHS STATE PRISON -ONE THIRD THE MID TERM, DOUBLED PER PC 667(D)(E) FOR A TOTAL OF 16  MONTHS STATE PRISON TO RUN CONSECUTIVE TO COUNT 2/X:SENTENCES ON COUNTS 2 & 4 REMAIN THE SAME/X:AS OF NOV, 10, 2015 TOTAL STATE PRISON TERM IS 9 YEARS AND 4 MONTHS/X:THE FINES, FEES, AND ORDER REGARDING RESTITUTION,OTHER ORDERS IMPOSED ON10-19-2011 REMAIN THE SAME/X:AN AMENDED STATE PRISON ABSTRACT TO BE PREPARED TO DELETE THE STATE PRISON SENTENCE ON COUNTS 6 & 7, AND TO INDICATE TOTAL PRISON SENTENCE  OF 9 YRS & 4 MONTHS,  AND INDICATE THE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED AS OF 11-10-2015/
